description: You are an IT deployment coordinator at an OLPC-equipped school. Export student reading logs from the Sugar Journal datastore at /home/ga/.sugar/default/datastore/ to /home/ga/Documents/Exported_Logs/. The datastore consists of UUID-named directories, each containing a data file and a metadata/ subdirectory with title and mime_type files. Create and execute a Python script at /home/ga/Documents/journal_exporter.py that scans these directories and copies only the data files with a text/plain mime-type to the destination, creating the destination directory if it does not exist. The exported files must be named using their respective title metadata with a .txt extension.
